name: seomeatagentscreator
included: IR, tool registry, manifest, trigger lab, output eval, and release review templates
Russian documentation and GitHub Pages landing page
public_package_policy: publish reusable instructions, templates, checklists, and docs
keep secrets, private data, temporary work artifacts, and local-only files out of the package
known_limits: This repository provides a universal creation system and templates.
Target platform adapters must be audited for the target runtime before public production claims.
External publishing, paid APIs, private data scans, and destructive actions remain approval-gated.
